data.body: DESIGN REQUIREMENT (from 252e subagent review): Config.from_mapping bakes defaults eagerly, so it CANNOT distinguish 'key absent' from 'key set to its default' — using it per-layer would let a lower-priority layer's default silently override a higher layer's explicit value. The loader MUST: (1) parse each layer (CLI/env/project/user) to a SPARSE coerced dict of ONLY-present keys (split coerce-and-validate from default-application); (2) deep-merge the sparse layers by precedence (CLI > env > project > user); (3) construct the typed Config (applying defaults) ONCE at the end via from_mapping on the merged dict. Add a sparse parse helper alongside the existing coercers; from_mapping stays the final merged-dict->typed step (already correct).
